STATEMENT OF DECISION FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAM, PERRIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOO, DONALD WOO, HELEN TARAVAL, LLC $40,857.00 PRINCIPAL, $5,218.00 COSTS, $7,544.07 (PREJUDGMENT INTEREST $4,870.01 AND $2,674.06), TOTAL JUDGMENT $53,619.07, , JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY. PLAINTIFF LAM AWARDED ATTORNEY'S FEES AGAINST DONALD AND HELEN WOO ONLY IN THE SUM $81,460.00. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT X-COMPLAINANTS DONALD AND HELEN WOO SHALL RECOVER $33,005.00 FROM X-DEFT TARAVAL, LLC; X-COMPLAINANTS WOO ENTITLED TO INDEMNIFICATION FROM TARAVAL FOR ANY PRE-JUDGMENT INTEREST AND COSTS OF SUIT PAID BY WOO TO LAM AS AWARDED BY THE COURT. X-COMPLAINANTS WOO TO RECOVER COST OF SUIT FROM X-DEFENDANT TARAVAL IN THE SUM OF $2,345.94. SEE SCANNED DOC
